case-number.description: Case number associated with this item.

collection-date.description: Date when the item was collected.

collector.description: Person or unit that collected the item.

estimated-value.description: Estimated monetary value of the item.

item-number.description: Unique item number as listed by an analyst.

item-picture.description: Picture or scan of the item.

item-status.description: Current handling status of the item.

owner.description: Known owner or possessor of the item.

packaging.description: How the item is packaged or sealed.

recovered-from.description: Place, object, or person from which the item was recovered.

seal-number.description: Seal or evidence bag number used for custody.

storage-location.description: Current storage location of the item.

description: A generic item object for analysts to track collection, custody, and contextual details of a physical item.
name: physical-item
